semantic.role: E2E test suite for the 'archspine init' command, validating advanced initialization scenarios including temporary project creation, git repository initialization, mocked interactive prompts, and configuration generation.
responsibilities: Sets up isolated temporary directories for each test case.
Initializes a minimal Git repository within the temporary directory.
Writes a wrapper script to mock the 'prompts' module and inject predetermined responses to simulate user input during CLI invocation.
Runs the built CLI executable (dist/cli/index.js) in a child process, capturing its behavior and output.
Cleans up temporary directories after each test via afterEach.
Validates that the CLI command generates expected output and configuration files.
outOfScope: Unit testing of individual modules or functions.
Testing of the 'archspine' CLI in scenarios other than init (e.g., add, remove).
Testing of the underlying file system or operating system abstractions.
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule test-file-suffix).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide E2E coverage for the advanced initialization workflow of the ArchSpine CLI.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Fixed ESLint errors, improved E2E prompt injection mocking, and ensured better-sqlite3 compatibility.
